title: Serbia — Vehicle Registration Application (Registracioni list za motorno-priključno vozilo, Obrazac 1)
description: The Ministry of Interior's (Ministarstvo unutrašnjih poslova, MUP) "Registracioni list za motorno-priključno vozilo" (Registration sheet for a motor/trailer vehicle, Obrazac 1 / Form No. 1), the single national form on which a vehicle's owner (or, for co-owned vehicles, a co-owner acting with the others' consent) applies for registration in Serbia's unified vehicle register, opening Serbia's DMV vertical (4 of 6), following Business Formation (GOV-2725, 48th jurisdiction), Visa (GOV-2760), and Taxes (GOV-2767). Per the Rulebook's own Article 5, this single form and its coded fields are used across every stage of a vehicle's registration lifecycle — not only first registration, but also issuance of a registration sticker, temporary registration, a change of plates/permit/sticker, and deregistration — with the applicable set of fields keyed off the form's own 'VRSTA POSTUPKA' (type of procedure) code (0-7). Published directly by MUP (mup.gov.rs) as the printed annex to the consolidated 'Pravilnik o registraciji motornih i priključnih vozila' (Rulebook on registration of motor and trailer vehicles), fetched directly and unauthenticated (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 2,018,355 bytes, sha256: 6d41e2f39d056f9ce8651104e83c0965c64eed53ece983e326aeb4b80939a965). This is a flat, non-AcroForm 92-page consolidated legal text (confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3: zero Widget annotations across every page), with Obrazac 1 printed on pages 37-39 as a plain caption-and-blank-line layout (no boxes, checkboxes, or table rulings survive in the PDF's own text/graphics layers — confirmed by rendering pages 37-39 to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas). Every field/label/code modeled here is read directly from Obrazac 1's own printed layout, cross-checked word-for-word against the Rulebook's own Article 4 (defining the EU-style vehicle codes J/D.1-D.3/E/F.1/G/K/P.1-P.3/Q/S.1-S.2/P5/L/R) and Article 5 (which legally itemizes, numbered 1-14, everything the form contains). This schema is scoped to Article 5's items 1 (vehicle data), the technical-inspection data transcribed onto the form, and items on the form's second side covering procedure type, owner/user/representative data, permit-sticker-plate data, insurance data, and the change-of-plates/change-of-permit/change-of-sticker/deregistration blocks (each gated on the matching VRSTA POSTUPKA code, since the Rulebook's own text ties each block to a specific procedure code). Article 5's own item 3 ('podatke o nazivu organa koji odlučuje o zahtevu' — data on the name of the authority deciding on the request: the police administration/station or the authorized legal entity handling sticker issuance, its registration number, and its authorization number/date) and item 2 ('datum prijema zahteva' — date the request was received) are excluded as office-intake/deciding-authority data, not applicant-facing content, consistent with this registry's established convention for the same class of content (e.g. co/runt's 'Organismo de Tránsito' box, rs/mfa's consular-only column). Article 5's items 13 ('odluku o zahtevu' — the decision on the request: certificate number/date, dates of collection of the certificate/sticker/plates and of the permit, each with an owner/representative signature line) and 14 ('podatke o ovlašćenom licu koje je obradilo zahtev' — the processing officer's own surname/first name/JMBG/signature) are likewise excluded as the deciding authority's own record of its decision and the processing officer's own identity, not applicant-submitted data. This v1.0.0 models 64 fields[] plus 6 documents[] entries drawn from Article 5's own list of mandatory attachments (technical-soundness certificate, mandatory third-party motor-vehicle liability insurance policy, proof of payment of the prescribed registration fee, proof of settled customs/tax duties for the vehicle, proof of ownership/origin of the vehicle, and proof of the owner's identity). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Serbia or the Ministry of Interior.

source.documentRef: Ministry of Interior, "Pravilnik o registraciji motornih i priključnih vozila" (consolidated text), Obrazac 1 — "Registracioni list za motorno-priključno vozilo" (pages 37-39 of 92)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2774, opening Serbia's DMV vertical (4 of 6) following Business Formation (GOV-2725), Visa (GOV-2760), and Taxes (GOV-2767). Independently fetched the source from scratch: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 2,018,355 bytes, sha256 6d41e2f39d056f9ce8651104e83c0965c64eed53ece983e326aeb4b80939a965, re-fetched a second time byte-for-byte identical. Confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): 92 pages, zero Widget annotations on any page. Located Obrazac 1 via full-text scan across all 92 pages (matching 'Obrazac 1'/'REGISTRACIONI LIST'), spanning pages 37-39. Extracted the full x/y-positioned text layer for pages 37-39 and rendered each to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas, confirming the annex is a plain caption-and-blank-line layout with no boxes/checkboxes/table rulings in the PDF's own content stream. Cross-checked every label and EU-style code against the Rulebook's own Article 4 (vehicle-code definitions) and Article 5 (the form's own legally-itemized 1-14 content list), which also grounds the scoping decisions disclosed in this schema's own top-level description and in VERIFICATION.md. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Vrsta vozila (J)
fields.description: The vehicle's type/category. Printed as a blank line with no options text, so modeled as free text rather than an invented enum.

fields.name: vehicleBrand
fields.label: Marka (D.1)
fields.description: The vehicle's make/brand.

fields.name: vehicleTypeVariantVersion
fields.label: Tip / Varijanta / Verzija (D.2)
fields.description: The vehicle's type, variant, and version, printed as one combined blank field.

fields.name: vehicleCommercialDesignationModel
fields.label: Komercijalna oznaka (Model) (D.3)
fields.description: The vehicle's commercial designation (model).

fields.name: chassisNumber
fields.label: Broj šasije (E)
fields.description: The vehicle's chassis number.

fields.name: maxPermissibleMassKg
fields.label: Najveća dozvoljena masa (F.1)
fields.description: The vehicle's maximum permissible mass, in kilograms.

fields.name: massKg
fields.label: Masa (G)
fields.description: The vehicle's (unladen/kerb) mass, in kilograms.

fields.name: homologationMark
fields.label: Homologacijska oznaka (K)
fields.description: The vehicle's homologation mark.

fields.name: engineDisplacementCm3
fields.label: Radna zapremina motora (P.1)
fields.description: The engine's working displacement, in cubic centimeters.

fields.name: enginePowerKw
fields.label: Snaga motora u kW (P.2)
fields.description: The engine's power, in kilowatts.

fields.name: fuelOrDriveType
fields.label: Vrsta goriva ili pogona (P.3)
fields.description: The vehicle's fuel type or drive type. Printed as a blank line with no options text, so modeled as free text rather than an invented enum.

fields.name: powerToMassRatioKwPerKg
fields.label: Odnos snaga/masa u kW/kg (samo za motocikle) (Q)
fields.description: The vehicle's power-to-mass ratio, in kW/kg. The form's own label states this applies only to motorcycles, so left optional for other vehicle types.
fields.sourceRef: Page 37: "Odnos snaga/masa u kW/kg (samo za motocikle) (Q):"

fields.name: seatingCapacityIncludingDriver
fields.label: Broj mesta za sedenje uključujući i mesto vozača (S.1)
fields.description: The number of seating places, including the driver's seat.
fields.sourceRef: Page 37: "Broj mesta za sedenje uključujući i mesto vozača (S.1):"

fields.name: standingCapacity
fields.label: Broj mesta za stajanje (S.2)
fields.description: The number of standing places, applicable mainly to buses/minibuses; left optional since it does not apply to every vehicle type (e.g. a passenger car).

fields.name: engineNumber
fields.label: Broj motora (P5)
fields.description: The vehicle's engine number.

fields.name: numberOfAxles
fields.label: Broj osovina (L)
fields.description: The vehicle's number of axles.

fields.name: vehicleColor
fields.label: Boja vozila (R)
fields.description: The vehicle's color.

fields.name: yearOfProduction
fields.label: Godina proizvodnje
fields.description: The vehicle's year of production, listed in Article 4 of the Rulebook alongside the coded vehicle-data items even though it carries no EU-style letter code of its own.

fields.name: bodyworkShape
fields.label: Oblik karoserije
fields.description: The vehicle's bodywork shape.

fields.name: loadCapacityKg
fields.label: Nosivost
fields.description: The vehicle's rated load capacity, in kilograms, where applicable (e.g. a cargo vehicle); left optional since it does not apply to every vehicle type.

fields.name: technicalInspectionBodyNameAndSeat
fields.label: Naziv i sedište ovlašćenog pravnog lica
fields.description: The name and registered seat of the legal entity authorized to perform the vehicle's technical inspection.
fields.sourceRef: Page 37, "PODACI O TEHNIČKOM PREGLEDU VOZILA": "Naziv i sedište ovlašćenog pravnog lica:"

fields.name: technicalInspectionBodyCode
fields.label: Šifra (tehnički pregled)
fields.description: The technical-inspection body's own code.

fields.name: technicalInspectionBodyIdNumber
fields.label: ID broj (tehnički pregled)
fields.description: The technical-inspection body's identification number.

fields.name: vehicleTechnicallySound
fields.label: Vozilo je tehnički ispravno
fields.description: The technical-inspection body's statement of the vehicle's technical soundness. Printed as a fixed heading rather than a labeled blank line; Article 5's own item 2 describes this as a 'konstatacija o tehničkoj ispravnosti vozila' (statement of the vehicle's technical soundness), so modeled as a boolean rather than free text.
fields.sourceRef: Page 37: "VOZILO JE TEHNIČKI ISPRAVNO"; Rulebook Article 5, item 2: "konstatacija o tehničkoj ispravnosti vozila"

fields.name: technicalInspectionDate
fields.label: Datum vršenja tehničkog pregleda
fields.description: The date the technical inspection was performed.

fields.name: technicalInspectionController
fields.label: Kontrolor
fields.description: The name of the controller/inspector who performed the technical inspection.

fields.name: technicalInspectionNote
fields.label: Napomena (tehnički pregled)
fields.description: A free-text note on the technical inspection. Printed with no explicit yes/no gate ahead of it, so left optional.

fields.name: procedureType
fields.label: Vrsta postupka
fields.description: The type of procedure being requested on this registration sheet. This single form is used across every stage of a vehicle's registration lifecycle; downstream fields in this document are gated on this selection per the Rulebook's own Article 5 item-by-item description.
fields.sourceRef: Page 37-38: "VRSTA POSTUPKA: ________" — legend "(0. Upis u jedinstveni registar vozila, 1 Izdavanje registracione nalepnice, 2. Privremena registracija, 3. Promena registarskih tablica, 4. Promena saobraćajne dozvole, 5. Promena registracione nalepnice, 6. Odjava vozila, 7. Ostalo)"

fields.name: ownerSurnameOrName
fields.label: Prezime - Naziv vlasnika vozila (C.1.1)
fields.description: The vehicle owner's surname (for a natural person) or full legal name (for a legal entity).

fields.name: ownerFirstName
fields.label: Ime vlasnika vozila (C.1.2)
fields.description: The vehicle owner's first name, applicable only when the owner is a natural person; left blank when ownerSurnameOrName is a legal entity's name.

fields.name: ownerResidenceOrSeatAddress
fields.label: Prebivalište - sedište (adresa) (C.1.3)
fields.description: The vehicle owner's residence address (for a natural person) or registered seat address (for a legal entity).

fields.name: ownerJmbgOrMb
fields.label: JMBG/MB vlasnika vozila
fields.description: The vehicle owner's unique master citizen number (JMBG, 13 digits, for a natural person) or company registration number (MB, for a legal entity).

fields.name: userSurnameOrName
fields.label: Prezime - Naziv korisnika vozila (C.3.1)
fields.description: The vehicle user's surname or full legal name, when the vehicle's user differs from its owner. Printed with no explicit yes/no gate ahead of this block, so left optional.

fields.name: userFirstName
fields.label: Ime korisnika vozila (C.3.2)
fields.description: The vehicle user's first name, applicable only when the user is a natural person.

fields.name: userResidenceOrSeatAddress
fields.label: Prebivalište - sedište (adresa) (C.3.3)
fields.description: The vehicle user's residence or registered seat address.

fields.name: userJmbgOrMb
fields.label: JMBG/MB (korisnik vozila)
fields.description: The vehicle user's JMBG or MB.

fields.name: representativeSurname
fields.label: Prezime zastupnika
fields.description: The surname of the representative acting on the owner's behalf, when the request is submitted through a representative. Printed with no explicit yes/no gate ahead of this block, so left optional.

fields.name: representativeFirstName
fields.label: Ime zastupnika
fields.description: The first name of the representative acting on the owner's behalf.

fields.name: representationBasis
fields.label: Osnov zastupanja
fields.description: The basis of the representative's authority to act (e.g. a power of attorney's number and date of certification).
fields.sourceRef: Page 38: "Osnov zastupanja:"; Rulebook Article 5, item 6: "osnov zastupanja/broj i datum overe punomoćja"

fields.name: registrationMark
fields.label: Registarska oznaka (A)
fields.description: The vehicle's registration mark (license plate), not applicable to a vehicle that has not yet been assigned one (e.g. a first-time registration).

fields.name: dateOfFirstRegistration
fields.label: Datum prve registracije (B)
fields.description: The vehicle's date of first registration, not applicable to a vehicle being registered for the first time on this same request.

fields.name: dateOfIssue
fields.label: Datum izdavanja (I)
fields.description: The date of issue of the traffic permit/temporary-registration certificate/registration sticker.

fields.name: permitRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Registarski broj dozvole
fields.description: The registration number of the traffic permit.

fields.name: permitSerialNumber
fields.label: Serijski broj dozvole
fields.description: The serial number of the traffic permit.

fields.name: stickerControlNumber
fields.label: Kontrolni broj registracione nalepnice
fields.description: The control number of the registration sticker.

fields.name: stickerValidUntil
fields.label: Važenje registracione nalepnice
fields.description: The registration sticker's validity (expiry) date.

fields.name: registrationValidUntil
fields.label: Važenje registracije (H)
fields.description: The registration's validity date — per the Rulebook's own Article 4/10, the date the registration plates are next due to be replaced.
fields.sourceRef: Page 38: "Važenje registracije (H):"; Rulebook Article 10: "H – pod kojom se upisuje važenje registracije (upisuje se datum kada se zamenjuju registarske tablice)"

fields.name: insuranceCompanyName
fields.label: Naziv osiguravajućeg društva
fields.description: The name of the insurance company that issued the vehicle's mandatory liability insurance policy.

fields.name: insuranceCompanyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: MB (osiguravajuće društvo)
fields.description: The insurance company's own registration number (MB).

fields.name: insurancePolicyNumber
fields.label: Broj polise osiguranja
fields.description: The vehicle's insurance policy number.

fields.name: insuranceValidUntil
fields.label: Važenje osiguranja
fields.description: The insurance policy's validity (expiry) date.

fields.name: plateChangeReason
fields.label: Razlog promene (registarske tablice)
fields.description: The reason for the registration-plate change, required only when the requested procedure is a change of plates.

fields.name: previousRegistrationMark
fields.label: Prethodna registarska oznaka
fields.description: The vehicle's previous registration mark, required only for a plate-change request.

fields.name: newRegistrationMark
fields.label: Nova registarska oznaka
fields.description: The vehicle's newly assigned registration mark, required only for a plate-change request.

fields.name: plateChangeDate
fields.label: Datum (promena registarskih tablica)
fields.description: The date of the plate change, required only for a plate-change request.

fields.name: permitChangeReason
fields.label: Razlog promene (saobraćajna dozvola)
fields.description: The reason for the traffic-permit change, required only when the requested procedure is a change of the traffic permit.

fields.name: permitChangeSerialNumber
fields.label: Serijski broj saobraćajne dozvole (promena)
fields.description: The serial number of the newly issued traffic permit, required only for a permit-change request.

fields.name: permitChangeDateOfIssue
fields.label: Datum izdavanja (promena saobraćajne dozvole)
fields.description: The date of issue of the newly issued traffic permit, required only for a permit-change request.

fields.name: stickerChangeReason
fields.label: Razlog promene (registraciona nalepnica)
fields.description: The reason for the registration-sticker change, required only when the requested procedure is a change of the registration sticker.

fields.name: stickerChangeDateOfIssueAndControlNumber
fields.label: Datum izdavanja i kontrolni broj (promena registracione nalepnice)
fields.description: The date of issue and control number of the newly issued registration sticker, printed as one combined field and required only for a sticker-change request.

fields.name: stickerChangeValidUntil
fields.label: Važenje registracione nalepnice (promena)
fields.description: The validity (expiry) date of the newly issued registration sticker, required only for a sticker-change request.

fields.name: deregistrationReason
fields.label: Razlog odjave
fields.description: The reason for deregistering the vehicle, required only when the requested procedure is deregistration.

fields.name: deregistrationDate
fields.label: Datum odjave
fields.description: The date of deregistration, required only for a deregistration request.

fields.name: plateProcedureUponDeregistration
fields.label: Postupak sa registarskim tablicama (odjava)
fields.description: What is done with the registration plates upon deregistration (e.g. surrendered, retained under a personalized-plate scheme), required only for a deregistration request.

documents.label: Proof of the vehicle's technical soundness (potvrda o tehničkoj ispravnosti vozila)
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 1: "potvrda o tehničkoj ispravnosti vozila koja sadrži tehničke podatke o vozilu ... Dokaz o tehničkoj ispravnosti vozila ne sme biti stariji od 30 dana"

documents.label: Mandatory motor-vehicle third-party liability insurance policy
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 2: "polisa obaveznog osiguranja vlasnika motornog vozila od odgovornosti za štetu koju motornim vozilom pričini trećim licima koja važi za period za koji se zahteva registracija vozila"

documents.label: Proof of settled customs and tax duties for the vehicle
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 3: "dokaz o izmirenim carinskim i poreskim obavezama za vozilo"

documents.label: Proof of payment of the prescribed vehicle-registration fee
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 4: "dokaz o uplati propisanih troškova za registraciju vozila, na kojem uz svrhu uplate mora biti navedena i registarska oznaka vozila ili broj šasije vozila ako se vozilo upisuje u registar prvi put"

documents.label: Proof of ownership or origin of the vehicle
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 5: "dokaz o vlasništvu, odnosno poreklu vozila, ako se vozilo prvi put upisuje u registar ili prilikom promene vlasništva" (proof of ownership or origin of the vehicle, if the vehicle is entered into the register for the first time or upon a change of ownership — both cases are filed under the 'upis u jedinstveni registar vozila' (registration in the unified vehicle register) procedure per this Rulebook article, which is why this document is gated on that procedureType value rather than a dedicated ownership-change code; the form's own VRSTA POSTUPKA legend has no separate code for a change of ownership)

documents.label: Proof of the vehicle owner's identity
documents.sourceRef: Rulebook Article 5, attachment item 6: "dokaz o identitetu vlasnika vozila (lična karta – za fizička lica, odnosno dokaz o upisu u registar kod nadležnog organa – za pravna lica)" (proof of the vehicle owner's identity: a national ID card — lična karta — for a natural-person owner, or proof of registration with the competent authority for a legal-entity owner)
